https://www.betterup.com/blog/how-to-have-good-work-life-balance#what-does-work-life-balance-mean?

https://doi.org/10.3390/ijerph17030907

IPD-work consortium. Long working hours and risk of coronary heart disease and stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis of published and unpublished data for 603,838 individuals. Lancet, 386(10005), 1739–1746. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0140-6736(15)60295-1
https://doi.org/10.1016/S0140-6736(15)60295-1
PubMed

https://news.un.org/en/story/2022/12/1131372
